mapper.select:
SELECT
board_idx as boardIdx,
board_name as boardName,
board_name_en as boardName,
DATE_FORMAT(date_created, '%Y-%m-%d') as dateCreated, user_id_created as userIdCreated, (select user_name_ko from user where user_id = b.user_id_created) as userNameCreated, DATE_FORMAT(date_modified, '%Y-%m-%d') as dateModified, user_id_modified as userIdModified, (select user_name_ko from user where user_id = b.user_id_modified) as userNameModified, (select count(*) from board_article c where c.board_idx = b.board_idx and c.delete_yn = 'N'
and c.open_yn = 'y'
) as articleCount, (select count(*) from attachment where board_idx = b.board_idx and flag_deleted = '0') as attachmentCount
FROM board b
/* WHERE exists (select d.board_article_idx from board_article d where d.board_idx = b.board_idx and d.open_yn = 'y') OR b.board_idx = 0 */
ORDER BY ( CASE board_idx WHEN 0 THEN 1 ELSE 2 END ) ASC, date_created DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT
FROM board b

SELECT
board_article_idx as boardArticleIdx, board_idx as boardIdx, subject as subject, content as content, hit_count as hitCount, DATE_FORMAT(date_created, '%Y-%m-%d') as dateCreated, user_id_created as userIdCreated, (select user_name_ko from user where user_id = b.user_id_created) as userNameCreated, DATE_FORMAT(date_modified, '%Y-%m-%d') as dateModified, user_id_modified as userIdModified, (select user_name_ko from user where user_id = b.user_id_modified) as userNameModified
FROM board_article b
WHERE board_article_idx = #{boardArticleIdx}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board ( board_name, date_created, user_id_created ) VALUES ( #{boardName}, now(), #{userIdCreated} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE board
SET
board_name = #{boardName},
board_name_en = #{boardName},
user_id_modified = #{userIdModified},
date_modified = now()
WHERE board_idx = #{boardIdx}

UPDATE
attachment
SET board_article_idx = #{boardArticleIdx},
attachment_order = CASE
WHEN attachment_idx = #{attachmentIdx} THEN (#{index} + 1)
END
WHERE attachment_idx IN
#{attachmentIdx}
AND flag_deleted = '0'
